name: EdgeUse
summary: The EdgeUse class defines how an Edge is used in the definition of a Face.

methods.name: edge
methods.summary: The edge method is used to retrieve the edge for the edge use.
methods.remarks: The edge method is used to retrieve the edge for the edge use.

returns.doc: an Edge object used by this edge use

methods.name: end_vertex_normal
methods.summary: The end_vertex_normal method is used to retrieve the vertex normal for the end point of this edgeuse.
methods.remarks: The end_vertex_normal method is used to retrieve the vertex normal for the end point of this edgeuse.

methods.name: face
methods.summary: The face method is used to retrieve the face used by this edge use.
methods.remarks: The face method is used to retrieve the face used by this edge use.

returns.doc: a Face object used by this edge use

methods.name: loop
methods.summary: The loop method is used to retrieve the loop for this edge use.
methods.remarks: The loop method is used to retrieve the loop for this edge use.

returns.doc: a Loop object that contains this edge use.

methods.name: next
methods.summary: The next method is used to retrieve the next edge use in a loop.
methods.remarks: The next method is used to retrieve the next edge use in a loop.

returns.doc: the next EdgeUse object in a loop

methods.name: partners
methods.summary: The partners method is used to retrieve all of the partner edge uses that uses the same edge.
methods.remarks: The partners method is used to retrieve all of the partner edge uses that uses the same edge.

returns.doc: an array of partner Edge Use objects.

methods.name: previous
methods.summary: The previous method is used to retrieve the previous edge use in a loop.
methods.remarks: The previous method is used to retrieve the previous edge use in a loop.

returns.doc: the previous Edge Use object in the loop

methods.name: reversed?
methods.summary: The reversed? method is used to determine if the edge direction is opposite of the edge use direction.
methods.remarks: The reversed? method is used to determine if the edge direction is opposite of the edge use direction. The edge use direction is the same as the loop it belongs to.

returns.doc: true if reversed, false if not reversed.

methods.name: start_vertex_normal
methods.summary: The start_vertex_normal method is used to retrieve the vertex normal for the start point of this edgeuse.
methods.remarks: The start_vertex_normal method is used to retrieve the vertex normal for the start point of this edgeuse.
